ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "bill_type_number" TEXT /* Type and number of the bill (e.g., HB 244) */,
  "short_title" TEXT /* Short title of the bill describing its content */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the current status was assigned */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill (e.g., Chapter Number Assigned, Vetoed, Died in Committee) */,
  "lc_number" TEXT /* Legislative Council (LC) number for tracking */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date when the bill was introduced */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the bill becomes effective if passed */,
  "bill_text_url" TEXT /* URL to the full text of the bill */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the bill */,
  "committee" TEXT /* Committee to which the bill is assigned */,
  "last_action" TEXT /* Description of the last action taken on the bill */,
  "last_action_date" TEXT /* Date of the last action taken on the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., Requester, Primary Sponsor) */,
  "associated_entity" TEXT /* Name of the associated entity (individual or organization) */,
  "association_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the association type */,
  "association_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the association began */,
  "association_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the association ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_associations_associated_entity FOREIGN KEY ("associated_entity") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_associations_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_associations_associated_entity FOREIGN KEY ("associated_entity") REFERENCES legislators ("legislator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_status_history" (
  "status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status changed */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status change */,
  "status_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "status_change_by" TEXT /* Entity or person who made the status change */,
  "status_change_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_status_history_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislators" (
  "legislator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the legislator */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or role of the legislator */,
  "district" TEXT /* District represented by the legislator */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the legislator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the legislator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the legislator */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the legislator's official website */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the legislator's term began */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the legislator's term ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., Advocacy Group, Corporation) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the organization's website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Legislator, Staff, Public) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the bill */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the bill was viewed */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to view the bill (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_views_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)
